---
title: "John Preskill『Quantum Computation』学習ノート"
number-sections: false
page-layout: full
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

# はじめに {.unnumbered}

このノートは、John Preskill 教授の講義ノート『Quantum Computation』に基づいた学習記録です。
Watrous 教授の教科書に比べ、より物理学的な直感と量子情報理論の結びつきに重点を置いて解説します。

# Chapter 1: Introduction {#chapter-1-preskill}

{{< include chapter1/_1.1-introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter1/_1.2-quantum-information.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter1/_1.3-efficient-quantum-algorithms.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter1/_1.4-quantum-complexity.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter1/_1.5-quantum-parallelism.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter1/_1.6-new-classification-of-complexity.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter1/_1.7-what-about-errors.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter1/_1.8-quantum-error-correcting-codes.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter1/_1.9-quantum-hardware.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter1/_1.10-summary.qmd >}}


# Chapter 2: Foundations I: States and Ensembles {#chapter-2-preskill}

{{< include chapter2/_2.1-axioms.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter2/_2.2-qubit.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter2/_2.3-density-operator.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter2/_2.4-schmidt-decomposition.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter2/_2.5-ambiguity.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter2/_2.6-distance-between-quantum-states.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter2/_2.7-summary.qmd >}}

# Chapter 3: Foundations II: Measurement and Evolution {#chapter-3-preskill}

{{< include chapter3/_3.1-orthogonal-measurement.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter3/_3.2-quantum-channels.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter3/_3.3-channel-state-duality.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter3/_3.4-three-quantum-channels.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter3/_3.5-master-equations.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter3/_3.6-non-markovian-noise.qmd >}}

{{< include chapter3/_3.7-summary.qmd >}}

---

## 参考文献 {.unlisted}
- Watrous, TQI, pp. XX-YY [@watrous2018]
- [その他参考文献]
